MDCL_SRGCL_MISC_AMT 
LABEL: 
Medical/Surgical Miscellaneous Amount ($) 
DESCRIPTION: The charge amount (rounded to whole dollars) for the medical/surgical miscellaneous supplies related 
to the beneficiary's stay.

LONG NAME: MDCL_SRGCL_MISC_AMT
